intro: Pasania clementiana, commonly known as Clement's Pasania, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Bioactive constituents of Pasania clementiana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and tannins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Pasania clementiana is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which may be used to support immune function and overall health.
